summary: FQ-09V visual variant pipeline: one visual id may now ship several optional variant images — the consecutive-file convention <id>_01.png..<id>_08.png (first gap ends the scan) or explicit array entries in data/visual_assets.json (validator: every path must exist, empty pools fail). BlockRegistry.visual_variant_textures resolves the pool (cached, cleared with the visual cache); world builds one tileset atlas source per variant with identical physics/occlusion, and _set_tile picks posmod(hash(Vector3i(cell.x, cell.y, world_seed)), n) — deterministic per seed+cell, never in saves. Single-image and no-image fallback paths byte-compatible; an explicit array's first entry doubles as the id's canonical single image so HUD/enemy consumers stay coherent. world.rebuild_tileset() smoke/dev hook. 5 self-cleaning fq09v_* checks (suite 185 -> 190); review SIGNABLE, should-fix guard + 2 clarity nits applied, loop re-ran green.
scope: FQ-09V only, per docs/FABLE_TASK_QUEUE.md — no new blocks, ores, stations, crops, enemies, or balance changes; the repo still ships zero art. Implementation commit 516bc13 plus this evidence-only packet commit; not pushed (operator-gated).
next_action: FQ-09A: future asset manifest and prompt packs.
